title: polygonum bistortoides var. oblongifolium
intro: Polygonum bistortoides var. oblongifolium, also known as American bistort, is a perennial herb belonging to the buckwheat family Polygonaceae. Traditionally, American bistort has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. American bistort can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusement for various herbal remedies, with the roots and leaves being commonly used for its medicinal purposes.
